meaning: n.托洛茨基(俄国革命领导者)
examples: But listening to the reliable defenders of the wealthy, you'd think that Ms.Warren was the second coming of Leon Trotsky.
Frida herself was no saint, indulging in multiple adventures with Diego's mistresses and a much-publicized series of trysts with exiled Russian revolutionary Leon Trotsky in the late 1930s.
Other candidates for Twitter feuds range from Dean Martin and Jerry Lewis to Josef Stalin and Leon Trotsky to those famous old epic-movie friends turned enemies, Ben-Hur and Messala.
